reviews.comment:
Desde que cambiaron el consecionario esta totalmente abandonada la playa de estacionamiento no se puede transitar de baches y pozos mas en dias de lluvia en días picos de autos como feriados largos y vacaciones un solo playero colas y espera para ser atendido

(Translated by Google)
Since the concessionaire changed, the parking lot is completely neglected; it's impossible to drive through due to potholes and ruts, especially on rainy days and peak traffic days like long weekends and holidays. There's only one attendant, and there are long lines and long waits to be served.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCenRxMkNBEAE
